Rung.Comment:
Anode Data
Layer 1 = bottom anode - part 1 Layer 9 (old 5) = top anode - part 2 Layer 5 = middle anode - part 3

Rung.Text: [[COP(StackData.Layer[3].RFID_Data.Data[0],Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[32],1) ,COP(StackData.Layer[7].RFID_Data.Data[0],Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[33],1) ] ,[[COP(blank_str,str_Collector_PNs,1) ,CONCAT(StackData.Layer[3].RFID_Data.Data[1],strcomma,str_Collector_PNs) ,CONCAT(str_Collector_PNs,StackData.Layer[7].RFID_Data.Data[1],str_Collector_PNs) ,COP(str_Collector_PNs,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[34],1) ] ,COP(StackData.Layer[7].RFID_Data.Data[1],Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[35],1) ] ,[[COP(blank_str,str_Collector_LNs,1) ,CONCAT(str_Collector_LNs,k_str_LotQuantity2,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[82]) CONCAT(str_Collector_LNs,k_str_LotQuantity,str_Collector_LNs) ,COP(str_Collector_LNs,Pia.Machine.Data_Trace.Value[36],1) ,MID(StackData.Layer[3].RFID_Data.Data[4],2,12,strTempTime) STOD(strTempTime,CPA_DATETIME_3_4.Hr) ,MID(StackData.Layer[3].RFID_Data.Data[4],2,15,strTempTime) STOD(strTempTime,CPA_DATETIME_3_4.Min) ,MID(StackData.Layer[3].RFID_Data.Data[4],2,18,strTempTime) STOD(strTempTime,CPA_DATETIME_3_4.Sec) ] ,[MID(StackData.Layer[7].RFID_Data.Data[4],4,1,strTempTime) STOD(strTempTime,CPA_DATETIME_7_4.Yr)
